film.title: Frailty
film.overview: A mysterious man arrives at the offices of an FBI agent and recounts his childhood: how his religious fanatic father received visions telling him to kill people who were in fact "demons."

dialogues.dialogue: - What are you doing? - Calling your dad.  - You can't. - Yes, I can.  Ought to be ashamed, making up stories.  But it's true. I can show you.  Come on. Let's go.

Won't do you any good now that you've wrecked your hands... but a couple of days, you'll be fine.  but a couple of days, you'll be fine.  I want you to know I'm proud of you.  And I know God's proud of you too.  Take some time off and let those blisters callous over.

but a couple of days, you'll be fine.  I want you to know I'm proud of you.  And I know God's proud of you too.  Take some time off and let those blisters callous over.  Then you can get back to it, all right?
I've been waiting for this moment ever since all this started.  I'm ready to fulfill my destiny.  I'm proud of you, son.  F**k you!  You f**k!
